PR #12: Add project filtering and sorting functionality

Documentation

Control Panel

A lightweight, vanilla web application to function as a personal control panel for managing side projects, tracking revenue, writing and publishing, AI tools, resources, and book inventory.

Features

  • Project management with status tracking
  • Activity logging from GitHub and manual entries
  • Documentation management with markdown support
  • Resource organization with quick links

Tech Stack

  • HTML
  • CSS (Tailwind CSS)
  • JavaScript (Vanilla)

Getting Started

Clone the repository and open the index.html file in your browser.
